full_text:
Lü You 呂由
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü You (呂由). Officer of Tao Qian. Defeated by Cao Ren when Cao Cao attacked Xuzhou. Lü You was affiliated with Tao Qian.
